g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are all the columns in DOCUMENT_LOCATORS?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of documents use DOCUMENT_LINK?')
sendPrompt('How does Prism handle linked documents?')
sendPrompt('What storage types use the DOCUMENT_FILE column?')
sendPrompt('Which document types are stored in DOCUMENT_FILE?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in DOCUMENT_CONTENT vs UDOCUMENT_CONTENT?')
sendPrompt('How does Blowfish decryption work for DOCUMENT_CONTENT?')
sendPrompt('Where does PATH_OR_TABLE point for external files?')
